items.raw_desc: Hálózati eszköz tartó STARLINK Standard Pipe Adapter Mount:STARLINK – kapcsolat bárhol a világonA SpaceX által kifejlesztett STARLINK műholdas internet ideális megoldás mindazok számára, akik megbízható és hozzáférhető internetkapcsolatra vágynak, bárhol a világon. It has been tested up to a weight of 15 kg, but the most optimal conditions for comfortable wearing are achieved up to 9 kg of the child's weight. It is made of stretchy and soft 100% organic cotton with GOTS certification, which guarantees the environmental sustainability and safety of the material. Its size can be easily adjusted with the roll pocket and the height can be adjusted with the back panel. All parents will find the crossing straps on the back easier to use, so they don't have to fiddle with the clips of the carrier. Children's heads are supported by the edge of the scarf and it also meets the requirements for hip position and ergonomic carrying of children. The MANDUCA Twist Regular can be worn on the stomach or on the side. The scarf complies with CENTR 16512:2015 safety guidelines.
